def negative_wrapper_function_only_renames_arguments_and_passthroughs_behavior():
    rule_id = "wrapper_function_only_renames_arguments_and_passthroughs_behavior"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag wrappers that add no policy, safety, or abstraction value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
